titleStmt.title: SII 9.604: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 604. (A.R. No. 554 of 1915.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE EASTERN WALL OF KANUMA-DODDAYYA'S TEMPLE NEAR KOTAKALU, ADONI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 14[6]5, Śubhakṛit, Kārtika, śu. 11 corresponding to A.D. 1542 October 19 Thursday (not verfiable), in the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya. It records that the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kōnēṭi-Timmayadēva-Mahāarasu, (son of) Rāmarāja, made a gift of gold out of the incomes of bēḍike, birāḍa and the like in the village Kōṭeyakallu situated in Ādavāni-vaḷita which had been granted to him by the king for nāyakatana, and a plot of land, for the service of the god Hanumantadēva at Kōṭeyakallu and for the tīrtha-chhatra. The gift was made for the merit of the king and for the attainment of Vaikuṇṭha by the donor's ancestors. Ādavāni-vaḷita is stated to have been a division of Hastināvati in the Mūḍa-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīśubhaśakavaruṣa
1465 śubhakrutusaṁvatsarada kārtti
ka śuda 11 pu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalu tuṁgabhadrā
tīradalu śrīviṭhalēśvarasaṁnidhiyala śrīmaṁnumahā
maṁḍalēśvara rāmarāja kōnēṭi tiṁmayadēvama
hāarasugaḷu
kōṭeyakalla hanumaṁtadēvarige A
naṁtavāda namaskārava māḍi samarpisi koṭṭa
bhūdānaśāsana śrīmaṁmahārājādhirānṛ
ja rājaparamēśvara vīrāpratāpa vīrāsadā
śivadēvamahārāyaru prutvī sāṁbrājyaṁ
gaivuttirdu mūḍanāḍa hastināvatige sa
luva Ādavāni vaḷitavanu namage nāyaka
tenake pālisida saṁmaṁdha kōṭeyakala grā
madalu bēḍike roka 12 .
varāha Ubhaya 3 pūrvada maryā
Ādavāni holaṁnū naṁ
ma svāmi sadāśivadēvamahārāyarige .
pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgabēkeṁdu naṁma pitrugaḷige
vayikuṁṭalōka prāptiĀgabēkeṁdu sa
rvamānyastaḷava biṭṭevāgi hanumaṁtadēvarige
Amutrapaḍige tīrthada chatrake dhāreyane
radu koṭeU dānake catusīmege voḷa
gāda nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa Akṣī
ṇi Āgāmi siddha sādhyagaḷeṁba Aṣṭabhōga
tējasvāmyavanu dhāreyaneradu koṭevū
yidake Āru tapidaru vāraṇāsiyali gōu braṁ
maṇaranu koṁda pāpake hōharu . svadattādvi
guṇaṁ pu(ṁ)ṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattāpa
laṁ bhavēt . śrī
Digital edition of SII 9.604 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
